info.name: Fapex API
info.description:
Fapex backend — health, SIWE auth, IPFS metadata, jobs, arbitrator.

**Prerequisites:** MongoDB (`MONGODB_URI`), JWT_SECRET, Pinata keys for IPFS uploads.

**Flow:** Health → Nonce → Verify (wallet SIWE) → Me → IPFS metadata → POST job → GET jobs → Arbitrator status.

Use `127.0.0.1` instead of `localhost` on Windows to avoid IPv6 hangs.

request.description: Smoke test — no auth, no MongoDB required. Check `mongodb` field: `connected` means DB is ready for nonce/jobs.
Requires MongoDB. Returns nonce, domain, chainId for building a SIWE message.

**Manual SIWE step (wallet required):**

1. Run **nonce** first.
2. Build EIP-4361 message with domain=`{{siweDomain}}`, chainId=`{{chainId}}`, nonce from response, address=`{{walletAddress}}`, uri from `APP_URL` in backend `.env`.
3. Sign with MetaMask.
4. Paste full message string into `siweMessage` env var and hex signature into `siweSignature`.
5. Send this request — copy `token` from response into `authToken`.
Protected — requires valid JWT from verify step.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Smart Contract Audit",
  "description": "Audit Solidity escrow contracts on Sepolia testnet.",
  "category": "development",
  "skills": ["Solidity", "Security"],
  "deliverables": "PDF audit report with findings and remediation plan.",
  "acceptanceCriteria": "All critical and high issues documented with reproducible PoCs.",
  "clientAddress": "{{walletAddress}}",
  "createdAt": "2026-06-23T00:00:00.000Z"
}

request.description: Requires auth + Pinata credentials in backend `.env`. Copy `metadataCID` from response into environment.
Public list. Requires MongoDB for data; returns empty list when DB is connected with no jobs.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Smart Contract Audit",
  "description": "Audit Solidity escrow contracts on Sepolia testnet for security vulnerabilities.",
  "category": "development",
  "contractValue": 100,
  "duration": 604800,
  "skills": ["Solidity", "Security"],
  "deliverables": "PDF audit report with findings and remediation plan.",
  "acceptanceCriteria": "All critical and high issues documented with reproducible PoCs."
}

request.description: Requires auth + MongoDB + Pinata + RPC. Backend uploads metadata to IPFS and attempts on-chain `createJob`. User must exist in DB (from nonce/verify) and not be Restricted tier.
Public — reads on-chain stake via Sepolia RPC. No MongoDB required.
